violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the potato french fry cutter were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. French fry cutter was taken apart and out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. Mechanism to be added to the toilet room doors to ensure they are self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

An accumulation of soil residue and debris was observed behind equipment in the bar area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Marinara Sauce and Meatballs, which was previously cooked and cooled, was only reheated to 125- and 153-degrees Fahrenheit respectively for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Food items were placed back in the oven for proper reheating at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Bottles of Juices at the bar were observed stored in the ice well used for ice for drinks. Juice bottles used and handled with bare hands are to be stored separately to prevent contamination of the ice used for drinks. Bottles were removed and separation/dividers to added. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024

Various sauces were observed held at 50-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of sauces. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
Sauces that were previously heated and cooled were held for more than 7 days. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023

The door to the outside, located in the in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Door sweep to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023

The mini fridge was observed holding an ambient temperature of 55 degrees. Unit was taken out of service. Unit shall not be used until it can hold an ambient temperature of 41 degrees or less. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
